REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $274.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MENLO CAPITAL GROUP LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EFFORT ENTERPRISES OF INDIANA INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENLO CAPITAL GROUP LLC $8,739.96 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,641.93 INTEREST, $274.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,455.89, SEE SCANNED DOC
